name: mega-python
description: Greenfield Python stack selection and idiomatic Python patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Opinionated Python stack and design guidance.
interface.longDescription: Skills for choosing a greenfield Python stack (uv, ruff, pyright, pytest, FastAPI) and applying idiomatic Python patterns around typing, async correctness, error handling, and testing.
defaultPrompt: Use mega-python to scaffold this service.
Use mega-python to review this Python design.
